info.title: 0xinsider API
info.description: Find your edge on Polymarket and Kalshi. Every wallet graded, every trade scored, every outlier flagged. API exposes trader grades, whale trades, smart money signals, and insider detection for AI agents, trading bots, and research tools. Normal API requests use a 30-second server timeout that returns HTTP 408 Request Timeout with an empty body when exceeded. Successful browser CORS preflight responses advertise Access-Control-Max-Age: 86400.

get.description: Unauthenticated API-origin discovery document pointing agents to the canonical API base URL, full docs, web-origin OpenAPI spec, health check, and representative authenticated data routes.

data.authentication: Bearer API key required for data endpoints; discovery and health are public.

get.summary: Redirect to the canonical OpenAPI spec
get.description: Unauthenticated API-origin compatibility redirect to the canonical web-origin OpenAPI JSON document at https://0xinsider.com/api/v1/openapi.json.

307.description: Temporary redirect to the canonical web-origin OpenAPI spec.

get.description: Returns a trader's grade (S through F), P&L, win rate, and optional strategy/category data. The path accepts either an Ethereum wallet address or a known trader username. Unknown lookups return sync_status "unknown" instead of 404.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Ethereum wallet address (0x...) or known trader username

parameters.name: expand[]
parameters.description: Backward-compatible alias for expand. Repeatable: strategy, categories, quant_metrics.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Include heavy fields. Repeatable: strategy, categories, quant_metrics.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Conditional GET validator from a previous ETag. Matching values return 304 Not Modified with an empty body.

304.description: Not Modified. Returned when If-None-Match matches the current payload.

post.description: Returns trader intelligence for 1-25 wallet addresses or known usernames. Results preserve request order, duplicate inputs return duplicate rows, and each item is charged one batch item unit before execution. Unknown trader lookups return data with sync_status "unknown" matching the single trader endpoint.

expand.description: Shared expand flags applied to every trader item.

X-Request-Cost.description: Number of batch item units charged for this request.

X-Batch-RateLimit-Limit.description: Batch item units allowed per minute.

X-Batch-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Batch item units remaining in the current sliding window.

X-Batch-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when the batch item window resets.

get.summary: Get a trader's position timeline for one market
get.description: Returns every Polymarket fill for one trader in one market, newest first, with server-computed running_amount and running_avg_price. Only HOT and WARM tier traders are tracked; other traders return 404. running_avg_price is a buy-weighted entry basis (sells do not change the running average) matching Polymarket /positions avgPrice semantics. Cursor-paginated. An id-keyed alias exists at GET /api/v1/traders/{id}/position-timeline.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Trader wallet address (0x...). Case-insensitive — addresses are lowercased server-side.

parameters.name: condition_id
parameters.description: Market condition_id. One timeline per (trader, market).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from previous response's next_cursor.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Conditional GET validator from a previous ETag. Matching values return 304 Not Modified with an empty body.

304.description: Not Modified. Returned when If-None-Match matches the current payload.

get.summary: Get a trader's position timeline by integer id
get.description: Id-keyed alias of GET /api/v1/trader/{address}/position-timeline. Response body is byte-identical for the same underlying trader. Useful for worker tasks and agent clients already holding a numeric traders.id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Internal traders.id (integer). Returns 404 when the trader is not HOT or WARM tier, identical to the address-keyed route.

parameters.name: condition_id
parameters.description: Market condition_id. One timeline per (trader, market).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from previous response's next_cursor.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Conditional GET validator from a previous ETag. Matching values return 304 Not Modified with an empty body.

304.description: Not Modified. Returned when If-None-Match matches the current payload.

get.description: Returns the current positions-board feed backed by the wallet_positions mirror. Ordered by current_value_usd DESC with deterministic (wallet, condition_id, outcome_index) tiebreakers. Pre-reconcile rows (current_value_usd IS NULL) are excluded. Cursor-paginated. Every filter pushes into SQL.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from previous response's next_cursor.

parameters.name: min_size
parameters.description: Minimum current position value in USD.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Exact match against provider-backed market_canonical.category.

parameters.name: min_grade
parameters.description: Minimum trader grade allowlist. `A` matches S and A; `B` matches S, A, B; etc.

parameters.name: side
parameters.description: Filter by the binary outcome side. `yes` maps to outcome_index=0, `no` to outcome_index=1.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Conditional GET validator from a previous ETag. Matching values return 304 Not Modified with an empty body.

304.description: Not Modified. Returned when If-None-Match matches the current payload.

get.description: Returns recent large trades with signal scoring. Filter by size, category, or trader grade. Filters are applied before pagination, and every request uses SQL-backed limit + 1 pagination so has_more and next_cursor reflect the filtered result set. Cursor-paginated, newest first. Market categories come from provider-backed market_canonical identity.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from previous response's next_cursor.

parameters.name: min_size
parameters.description: Minimum trade size in USD.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by provider-backed market_canonical category (case-insensitive).

parameters.name: min_grade
parameters.description: Minimum trader grade.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Conditional GET validator from a previous ETag. Matching values return 304 Not Modified with an empty body.

304.description: Not Modified. Returned when If-None-Match matches the current payload.

get.description: Returns historical whale trades from local whale_alerts rows, not request-time provider fetches. Filter by condition_id, trader, category, minimum grade, platform, and RFC3339 from/to windows. All filters are pushed into SQL before LIMIT, every request uses SQL-backed limit + 1 pagination, and results are ordered newest first by traded_at desc, id desc. Metadata exposes local_replay source and best_effort completeness.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from previous response's next_cursor. Prefix: wth_. URL-encode when replaying as a query parameter.

parameters.name: min_size
parameters.description: Minimum trade size in USD.

parameters.name: condition_id
parameters.description: Exact raw provider condition_id. Unknown markets return an empty list.

parameters.name: trader
parameters.description: Trader wallet address, timestamp-suffixed wallet alias, or username resolved against the traders table. Unknown traders return an empty list.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by provider-backed market_canonical category (case-insensitive).

parameters.name: min_grade
parameters.description: Minimum trader grade.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Filter by whale_alerts.platform. all is equivalent to omitted.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive RFC3339 lower bound on whale_alerts.traded_at.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Exclusive RFC3339 upper bound on whale_alerts.traded_at. Must be after from when both are present.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Conditional GET validator from a previous ETag. Matching values return 304 Not Modified with an empty body.

304.description: Not Modified. Returned when If-None-Match matches the current payload.

get.description: Returns ranked traders (grades S/A/B) sorted by score descending. Supports cursor pagination and optional category/strategy filters.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor (score_address format).

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by category slug.

parameters.name: strategy
parameters.description: Filter by ML-detected strategy type. Values come from backend/src/trader_analysis/classification/decision_tree.rs and are matched exactly against trader_classifications.primary_type. Unknown values currently match zero rows; the handler does not return HTTP 400.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Conditional GET validator from a previous ETag. Matching values return 304 Not Modified with an empty body.

ETag.description: Stable validator for the current leaderboard payload. Re-send it via If-None-Match for conditional GETs.

304.description: Not Modified. Returned when If-None-Match matches the current leaderboard payload.

ETag.description: Validator for the unchanged leaderboard payload.

get.description: Search prediction markets by keyword. Returns representative market matches with status, category, and platform metadata. Cursor pagination advances over grouped market results rather than raw sub-market rows.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query. Must be 1-512 characters before whitespace trimming and non-empty after trimming.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from previous response's next_cursor.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by market status.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by category.

get.description: Browse whale-active titled markets with category, platform, status, and keyword filters. Paginates visible discovery entries rather than raw market rows, returns live category/platform facets alongside grouped event clusters or standalone markets, and includes total on the first page only. Categories come straight from provider metadata (Polymarket Gamma, Kalshi) and facets are flat value/label/count rows.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by provider-native market category (case-insensitive, no parent/child expansion).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by market status.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Filter by source platform.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order for the discovery feed.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from the previous response.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Keyword search against market titles.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Conditional GET validator from a previous ETag. Matching values return 304 Not Modified with an empty body.

ETag.description: Stable validator for the current explore payload. Re-send it via If-None-Match for conditional GETs.

total.description: Total matching visible entries after grouping. Present on the first page and omitted on cursor pages.

304.description: Not Modified. Returned when If-None-Match matches the current explore payload.

ETag.description: Validator for the unchanged explore payload.

get.description: Smart money flow analysis for a specific market — net flow direction, whale trade count, buy/sell volumes, and top graded trader positions.

parameters.name: condition_id
parameters.description: Market condition ID. Use the condition_id returned by /api/v1/markets/search, not the prefixed market.id value (mkt_...).

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description: Lookback window for whale flow aggregation.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Conditional GET validator from a previous ETag. Matching values return 304 Not Modified with an empty body.

304.description: Not Modified. Returned when If-None-Match matches the current payload.

post.description: Returns smart-money market intelligence for 1-25 raw provider condition_id values. Results preserve request order, duplicate inputs return duplicate rows, and each item is charged one batch item unit before execution. Do not pass prefixed mkt_ IDs; use market.condition_id from search or explore.

X-Request-Cost.description: Number of batch item units charged for this request.

X-Batch-RateLimit-Limit.description: Batch item units allowed per minute.

X-Batch-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Batch item units remaining in the current sliding window.

X-Batch-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when the batch item window resets.

get.description: Provider-first market card snapshot with canonical identity, outcome labels, cached top-of-book when available, liquidity, live sports context, and explicit freshness/unavailable states.

parameters.name: condition_id
parameters.description: Market condition ID. Use the condition_id returned by /api/v1/markets/search or /api/v1/markets/explore, not the prefixed market.id value (mkt_...).

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Conditional GET validator from a previous ETag. Matching values return 304 Not Modified with an empty body.

304.description: Not Modified. Returned when If-None-Match matches the current payload.

get.description: Suspicious trading patterns — pre-resolution accumulation, coordinated wallets, unusual timing. Cursor-paginated by suspicion score.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from previous response.

parameters.name: min_suspicion
parameters.description: Minimum suspicion score (0-100).

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity level.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Conditional GET validator from a previous ETag. Matching values return 304 Not Modified with an empty body.

304.description: Not Modified. Returned when If-None-Match matches the current payload.

get.description: Returns durable public whale-trade intelligence events strictly after an opaque cursor backed by whale_alerts.id. This is a separate API-key contract from the browser/session /api/events/feed stream: browser-only and private alert, following, radar, and position patch events are excluded until they have a durable public outbox.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque event replay cursor returned as next_cursor by a prior response. The cursor maps to whale_alerts.id and is valid across backend replicas. Omit to fetch the latest durable public suffix.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum durable public whale-trade events to return.

get.description: Returns webhook destinations owned by the authenticated API key user. Disabled endpoints are omitted.

post.description: Creates a pending HTTPS webhook destination. The response includes one-time signing_secret and verification.token values. Deliveries are not sent until the endpoint is verified.

get.description: Returns one webhook destination owned by the authenticated API key user.

patch.description: Updates name, HTTPS URL, event types, or enabled state. URL changes force pending_verification and return a new verification token.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a webhook destination owned by the authenticated API key user. Existing delivery audit rows remain retained.

post.description: Activates a pending webhook destination when the one-time verification token matches and has not expired.

post.summary: Rotate a builder webhook signing secret
post.description: Rotates the endpoint signing secret and returns the new signing_secret once in the response.

get.description: Returns API health status. No authentication required. Limited to 60 requests per minute per IP.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Conditional GET validator from a previous ETag. Matching values return 304 Not Modified with an empty body.

ETag.description: Stable validator for the current health payload. Re-send it via If-None-Match for conditional GETs.

background_jobs.description: Public-safe aggregate status for expected background job successful-completion heartbeats. Does not expose Redis keys, job names, raw errors, provider payloads, wallet addresses, or condition IDs.

304.description: Not Modified. Returned when If-None-Match matches the current health payload.

ETag.description: Validator for the unchanged health payload.

post.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Streamable HTTP transport. Accepts a JSON-RPC 2.0 request and returns a JSON-RPC response. Supported methods: initialize, notifications/initialized, ping, tools/list, tools/call. Nine tools are exposed: get_leaderboard, get_trader, get_whale_trades, get_market_intel, get_insider_radar, get_positions, get_position_timeline, search_markets, explore_markets — each dispatches to the matching /api/v1/* handler in-process so auth, rate limits, and payload shape match. Auth should use Authorization: Bearer <token>. ?token=<token> remains a legacy compatibility path for URL-only MCP clients, but URL secrets can land in shell history, browser history, and logs, so prefer headers or the stdio package. Mcp-Session-Id is minted on initialize and echoed on every response. Origin header, when present, is validated against the 0xinsider + localhost allowlist.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Deprecated compatibility API-key query parameter for remote MCP clients that cannot send Authorization headers. Prefer Authorization: Bearer <token> or the stdio package because URL secrets are easier to leak through logs and history.

parameters.name: Mcp-Session-Id
parameters.description: Session ID minted by the server on initialize; echoed on every subsequent request.

get.description: Opens a text/event-stream connection for server-initiated notifications as described in the MCP Streamable HTTP transport. The endpoint currently sends no notifications — clients that only care about request/response use POST.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: API key as query parameter (same contract as POST).

parameters.name: Mcp-Session-Id
parameters.description: Session ID minted by the server on initialize.

get.description: Returns a dated daily whale-activity report snapshot with source_range, snapshot.status, completeness, and reconciliation metadata. Report whale volume is local whale-alert activity volume, not provider lifetime trader volume.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: UTC report date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

get.description: Returns a weekly whale-activity report snapshot. Pass either from/to UTC dates or an ISO YYYY-WW week token. The response identifies closed ranges as final and current ranges as rolling.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: UTC source-range start in YYYY-MM-DD format; required with to.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: UTC source-range end in YYYY-MM-DD format; required with from.

parameters.name: week
parameters.description: ISO week selector in YYYY-WW format; alternative to from/to.

get.description: Returns a UTC monthly whale-activity report snapshot with source_range, completeness, and reconciliation metadata.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: UTC report month in YYYY-MM format.

get.description: Returns export source-range, completeness, volume reconciliation, row-count estimate, and large-export policy for one trader. V1 is metadata-only; full raw dataset export remains on the internal streaming or async export route.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Trader wallet address (0x...) or known trader username-style lookup accepted by the export read model.

get.summary: Inspect current API usage without spending primary request quota
get.description: Returns the authenticated caller sliding-window request budget and UTC-day usage. This endpoint is authenticated and does not increment the primary Redis rate-limit counter or log itself into the API usage table; it is separately throttled at 100 reads/minute per user to protect the usage-count query.

200.description: Usage budget and counters for the authenticated API key owner.

WebhookId.name: id
WebhookId.description: Webhook endpoint id owned by the authenticated API key user.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Optional safe-retry key. Reuse the same value only when retrying the exact same mutation request body; a different body returns 422 and an in-flight matching request returns 409.

token.description: One-time verification token returned only on create or URL change.

signing_secret.description: Returned only on create or rotate-secret.

url.description: Public HTTPS callback URL. Local/private/internal targets are rejected.

cache_age_s.description: Cache age in seconds, null if not cached.

api_base_url.description: Canonical API origin for public V1 requests.

authentication.const: Bearer API key required for data endpoints; discovery and health are public.

authenticated_routes.description: Representative authenticated data routes. Full route coverage lives in OpenAPI and llms-full.txt.

cache_age_s.description: Cache age in seconds, null if not cached.

reason.description: Explains that local replay completeness can vary by market and time window.

id.description: Opaque event ID; currently identical to cursor for the whale_alerts.id sequence.

TrustSource.description: Source metadata for a trust-critical value. Providers and DB/read models own business truth; clients should not infer missing provider facts from titles, slugs, zeros, or empty arrays.

owner.description: Provider, table/read-model, cache, or service that owns the value.

field.description: Provider field, DB column, or computed field name when applicable.

TrustFreshness.description: Freshness metadata for a trust-critical value. This is separate from transport cache fields in ResponseMeta.

TrustReconciliation.description: How provider-owned facts were reconciled with stored/read-model values.

TrustCompleteness.description: Whether the described value or result set is complete for its stated contract.

TrustMetadata.description: Shared source/freshness/reconciliation/completeness metadata for public API values that may be cached, stale, partial, computed, or provider-unavailable. Unavailable provider values must be represented with explicit metadata instead of fabricated zeros or empty arrays.

event_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the on-chain fill.

amount_delta.description: Signed share delta (+ on buy, − on sell).

price.description: Fill price in USDC per share, in [0,1].

usdc_notional.description: Positive USDC notional of the fill.

tx_hash.description: Polygon transaction hash of the fill.

running_amount.description: Cumulative signed share balance after this fill.

running_avg_price.description: Buy-weighted entry basis (matches Polymarket /positions avgPrice semantics). Sells do not change this value. 0 when no buys have occurred yet.

form_tier.description: Recent-form tier (trailing-7d cross-sectional percentile); a separate axis from the all-time grade. Null when no recent activity.

category_strengths.description: Per-category performance breakdown (expand=categories or expand[]=categories). Null unless expanded. Object keyed by category name; each value is the precomputed trader_rankings.category_ranks payload (rank, total_in_category, total_pnl, scaled_total_pnl, n_markets, wins, losses, win_rate; scaled_total_pnl is a legacy alias that currently equals total_pnl). Pass-through DB JSON: keys and value shape are DB-owned, so the inner shape is intentionally unconstrained and may carry additional compatibility fields.

quant_metrics.description: Advanced risk/performance metrics (expand=quant_metrics or expand[]=quant_metrics). Null unless expanded. Pass-through of the advanced_metrics row as JSON (trader_id and id stripped); the metric key-set is DB-owned and additive, so the inner shape is intentionally unconstrained.

platform.description: Provider discriminator. Slice 5 ships Polymarket only; the field stays in the response shape so Kalshi positions can land without a breaking change.

side.description: Binary outcome side. Non-binary positions are not surfaced on V1.

shares.description: Live share count from the wallet_positions mirror.

avg_price.description: Volume-weighted entry price for this leg.

current_value_usd.description: Current mark-to-market value in USD (always non-null on V1 — pre-reconcile rows are excluded).

cash_pnl.description: Unrealized P&L for the open position (Polymarket `cashPnl`).

last_reconciled_at.description: Max updated_at across mirror legs for this pair.

freshness.description: Backend-computed staleness bucket derived from last_reconciled_at.

is_new_wallet.description: Wallet is younger than the new-wallet threshold (30 days).

outcome_label.description: Provider-reported outcome label (e.g. team name for sports). Separate from `side` because provider labels can diverge from the binary Yes/No axis.

form_tier.description: Recent-form tier (trailing-7d cross-sectional percentile); a separate axis from the all-time grade. Null when no recent activity.

url_slug.description: First-party market page slug used for internal links.

outcome_yes_label.description: Display label for the YES/outcome_index=0 side, enriched from provider outcome metadata when available.

outcome_no_label.description: Display label for the NO/outcome_index=1 side, enriched from provider outcome metadata when available.

outcome_yes_provider_id.description: Provider-owned YES/outcome_index=0 identifier when available for trade-ticket wiring.

outcome_no_provider_id.description: Provider-owned NO/outcome_index=1 identifier when available for trade-ticket wiring.

discover_score.description: Backend-owned deterministic market discovery score used by the hot sort.

reset.description: Unix timestamp when the batch item window resets.

request_cost.description: Number of batch item units reserved before execution.

index.description: Zero-based request index. Duplicate inputs keep separate result rows.
Zero-based request index. Duplicate inputs keep separate result rows.

daily_usage.description: UTC-day usage count. Current V1 has no daily hard cap, so limit and remaining are null rather than synthesized.

RequestTimeout.description: Request exceeded the server's 30-second transport timeout. The timeout response has an empty body because it is generated before handler-level JSON error shaping.

RateLimited.description: Rate limit exceeded (100 req/min; batch endpoints also reserve 100 batch item units/min before execution)

RateLimitUnavailable.description: Redis-backed authenticated rate limiter unavailable; retry after the per-process outage cooldown

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the middleware will probe the Redis-backed rate limiter again.

IdempotencyInProgress.description: An Idempotency-Key request with the same body is still in progress. Retry shortly with the same key and body.

error.message: Idempotency-Key request is still in progress; retry shortly

IdempotencyConflict.description: The Idempotency-Key was already used with a different request body.

different_body.summary: Idempotency key reused with a different body

error.message: Idempotency-Key already used with a different request body

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Authenticated V1 per-user request limit for the current sliding window.

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Authenticated V1 requests remaining in the current sliding window after this response.

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when the authenticated V1 request window resets.

X-Request-Id.description: Server-generated request identifier for support and tracing.

ETag.description: Strong validator for conditional GET. Send as If-None-Match to receive 304 when unchanged.

tags.name: Traders

tags.name: Positions
tags.description: Current prediction-market position snapshots from backend-owned mirrors.

tags.name: Whale Trades

tags.name: Leaderboard
